topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that automate smart-home actions based on events scheduled in Google Calendar, such as adjusting thermostat settings, turning lights off, or arming security devices when meetings or events start.

rows.if_then_rule: IF Event from search starts from Google Calendar THEN Turn A/C on using Sensibo.
IF Event from search starts from Google Calendar THEN Switch on using SmartThings.
IF Event from search starts from Google Calendar THEN Security mode using Somfy Protect.
IF Event from search starts from Google Calendar THEN Control camera shutter using Somfy Protect.
